packageRules.description: Configure dependencies (labels, commit format as releasable).
Pin third-party GitHub Action digests (SHA + version comment). Excludes reside-eng first-party actions/workflows which stay on floating major tags.
Group non-major action dependencies (auto-merge governed by the shared publisher whitelist in default.json)
Configure Github Actions dependencies (labels, commit format). NOTE: This is actions for this repo NOT templates.
